name: Inbox Coach follow-up workflow coded review-findings sample

source.boundary: Reviewer-coded outcomes are attached for this benchmark only; replacement readiness remains scoped to this research stage and evidence type.

human_panel.segment: independent consultants and small agency operators

review_findings.title: uncertain ROI
review_findings.observation: Participants wanted clearer proof of payback before they changed an existing follow-up workflow.

review_findings.trust_concern: proof that it fits existing habits
review_findings.observation: Several interviewees needed evidence that the workflow would fit current habits without extra upkeep.

review_findings.title: privacy risk
review_findings.observation: Client data handling raised privacy concerns during the follow-up interviews.
